title: show image digest on `push`
body:
**Description**
after I build and then push an image, it would easily remove a step if the image digest was displayed after a successful push

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**
1. `buildah bud -t foo .`
2. `buildah push --tls-verify=false foo localhost:5000/foo`
3.


**Describe the results you received:**
```
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob sha256:7d8d96e50b63b9bbacceb67ab67cd8118c90fdfa544de31c3584833600cab8ca
 198.59 MiB / 198.59 MiB [=================================================] 20s
Copying blob sha256:5f70bf18a086007016e948b04aed3b82103a36bea41755b6cddfaf10ace3c6ef
 1.00 KiB / 1.00 KiB [======================================================] 0s
Copying blob sha256:5f70bf18a086007016e948b04aed3b82103a36bea41755b6cddfaf10ace3c6ef
 1.00 KiB / 1.00 KiB [======================================================] 0s
Copying blob sha256:a91104d57b4eb39eea4576a5d46d042200bfb76ce70347378a9a8b93ba315579
 617.08 MiB / 617.08 MiB [=================================================] 58s
Copying blob sha256:5f70bf18a086007016e948b04aed3b82103a36bea41755b6cddfaf10ace3c6ef
 1.00 KiB / 1.00 KiB [======================================================] 0s
Copying blob sha256:5f70bf18a086007016e948b04aed3b82103a36bea41755b6cddfaf10ace3c6ef
 1.00 KiB / 1.00 KiB [======================================================] 0s
Copying blob sha256:5f70bf18a086007016e948b04aed3b82103a36bea41755b6cddfaf10ace3c6ef
 1.00 KiB / 1.00 KiB [======================================================] 0s
Copying config sha256:84ce2d0b16a7c17295453c6dc95636262a5b0f2e166aa67cb145c666173f3157
 3.07 KiB / 3.07 KiB [======================================================] 0s
Writing manifest to image destination
Copying config sha256:84ce2d0b16a7c17295453c6dc95636262a5b0f2e166aa67cb145c666173f3157
 0 B / 3.07 KiB [-----------------------------------------------------------] 0s
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
```

**Describe the results you expected:**
Something like
```
Succefully pushed localhost:5000/foo@sha256:a5f36c88810c515c6b884f3e0c968235dcb9fc4db9a5f44a4771640f1a76a736
```
This is currently have to be seen via `buildah images --digests foo`


**Output of `buildah version`:**

```
Version:         1.3
Go Version:      go1.10.3
Image Spec:      1.0.0
Runtime Spec:    1.0.0
CNI Spec:        0.3.1
libcni Version:  v0.6.0
Git Commit:      4888163
Built:           Sun Aug  5 07:31:55 2018
OS/Arch:         linux/amd64
```
